processing.text: if @@admin = 0 and @type = '1' begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.MaxvOnline$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, 'ExpenseGroup', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = '0' end declare @message nvarchar(4000), @q nvarchar(4000), @fields nvarchar(4000), @duplicate nvarchar(4000), @irregular nvarchar(4000), @field varchar(32), @irregularChars varchar(128), @r int select @irregularChars = &IrregularValue; select @duplicate = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell đã có hoặc lồng nhau.' else 'The value of cell %invalidCell is invalid or already exists.' end select @irregular = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell có chứa các ký tự: ' + @irregularChars else 'The value of cell %invalidCell contains any of the following characters: ' + @irregularChars end -- Check alter table @@table alter column ma_nh char(32) create index i on @@table (ma_nh) if @type = '0' delete @@table from @@table a join dmnhkh b on a.loai_nh = b.loai_nh and a.ma_nh = b.ma_nh select @field = 'ma_nh', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_nh like '%[' + @irregularChars + ']%'&Irregular; select a.* into #k from @@table a join dmnhkh b on a.ma_nh = b.ma_nh and a.loai_nh = b.loai_nh delete @@table from @@table a join #k b on a.loai_nh = b.loai_nh and a.ma_nh = b.ma_nh -- select @field = 'ma_nh' select @q = 'select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a, @@table b with (index(i)) where a.loai_nh = b.loai_nh and a.ma_nh <> b.ma_nh and a.ma_nh like rtrim(b.ma_nh) + ''%''' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a, dmnhkh b with (index(PK_dmnhkh)) where a.loai_nh = b.loai_nh and a.ma_nh like rtrim(b.ma_nh) + '%'&Duplicate; select @q = 'select top 1 @r = b.stt from dmnhkh a, @@table b with (index(i)) where a.loai_nh = b.loai_nh and a.ma_nh like rtrim(b.ma_nh) + ''%''' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; -- Insert select @q = 'insert into dmnhkh(loai_nh, ma_nh, ten_nh, ten_nh2, status, datetime0, datetime2, user_id0, user_id2, ' select @q = @q + 'ma_td1, ma_td2, ma_td3, sl_td1, sl_td2, sl_td3, gc_td1, gc_td2, gc_td3, s1, s2, s3, s4, s5, s6)' select @q = @q + 'select loai_nh, ma_nh, ten_nh, ten_nh2, ''1'', getdate(), getdate(), rtrim(@@userID), rtrim(@@userID), '''', '''', '''', ' select @q = @q + ' 0, 0, 0, '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', 0, 0, 0 from @@table' exec sp_executesql @q if @type = '1' begin update dmnhkh set ten_nh = b.ten_nh, ten_nh2 = b.ten_nh2, datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID from dmnhkh a, #k b where a.ma_nh = b.ma_nh and a.loai_nh = b.loai_nh end
